tier3Eligibility.blocker: Tier 3 ineligible until package signing first pass is completed for the adapted marketplace packages.
tier3Eligibility.reason: FLOW-21 completed the full three-tenant fork cascade, local registry publication/readback, green GitHub Actions evidence, viewport screenshots, and post-cascade live Docker/Vault auth checks. Package signing first pass remains pending, so the earned certification is capped at Tier 2+.

productDecisionClosure.decision: FLOW-21 dynamic-forms-workflows completes the mobility/auth protocol evidence through three tenant repos, three adapted packages, green GitHub Actions, Verdaccio readbacks, screenshots, and post-cascade live auth. Certification is capped at Tier 2+ until package-signing first pass is implemented.
evidence: Tenant B installed from Tenant A, adapted, and published @xiigen-fork/northwind-intake-automation-workflows@1.0.2.
Tenant C installed from Tenant B, adapted, and published @xiigen-fork/tessera-collective-intake-workflows@1.0.3.

Package-signing first pass remains pending and prevents Tier 3 declaration.

tierBasis: Docker/Vault auth completed with tenant credentials and tenant signing material under all three tenant Vault paths.
Tenant A forked original FLOW-21 source through the marketplace API, adapted, published v1.0.1, and passed real GitHub Actions.
Tenant B forked Tenant A through the marketplace API, adapted, published v1.0.2, and passed real GitHub Actions.
Tenant C forked Tenant B through the marketplace API, adapted, published v1.0.3, and passed real GitHub Actions.
Local registry readbacks match each adapted package version, git head, and package shasum.
Real repo, Actions, registry, and viewport screenshots exist for each cascade point.
Post-cascade auth matrix passed 18/18 with Vault-backed JWTs and no secret material committed.
Tier 3 is withheld because package signing first pass is still pending.
